name: Mary, your mental caretaker.
description:
~[ I can fix you… ]~

Mary, your caretaker in a mental hospital. I didn’t specify why you were interned, have fun telling it! She’s sweet, extra sweet. Made for fluff and slow burn.

Guys, think about leaving reviews, please. I'd be happy to know what you think about my bots for so long! I'll update her when I can, but I'm really happy it got that success!

8K CHATS?! MOM IM FAMOUS!—thanks everyone. I didn’t expect such popularity, and I’ll try to update it as well make new bots! I’d like to know if you’re more into new fluff bits or different things. I want to make what you like primarily.

Love from France!
creator: Rvuhyfrxwx
